name: EU AI Act Baseline (Articles 9/12/14/15)
description: Baseline governance policies for EU AI Act compliance. Covers risk management (Article 9), record-keeping (Article 12), human oversight (Article 14), and accuracy/robustness (Article 15).

policies.description: Blocks requests to models that have not been attested as active. Implements Article 9 risk management by ensuring only approved models are used in production.
Warns when a model is only self-attested rather than admin-verified. Supports Article 9 risk management controls requiring documented conformity.
Always-pass policy ensuring every interaction is recorded for Article 12 record-keeping obligations. Acts as a sentinel for audit coverage.
Warns when PII is detected in model output, triggering human review workflows. Supports Article 14 human oversight requirements for high-risk AI.
Blocks toxic or harmful content in responses. Supports Article 15 accuracy and robustness requirements ensuring the AI system does not produce harmful outputs.
